description: Era production signatures for fingerprint matching. These complement ERA_PROFILES in fingerprints.py with richer context.

pre_1970.name: Pre-1970
pre_1970.psychosomatic_note: The constraints of the format become an authenticity signature. Tape compression is friendly compression — it preserves dynamics while adding warmth. The noise floor carries evidence of the physical environment.

1970s.name: 1970s
production_markers: limited dynamic range control (before digital limiters)
1970s.psychosomatic_note: The peak of natural dynamics in recorded music. Ensemble playing created natural compression without destroying the crest factor. The body hears space between sounds.

1980s.name: 1980s
1980s.psychosomatic_note: First era where production technique became audibly artificial. The gated snare is the decade's sonic signature — presence and absence as shock. Groove_deviation begins declining as MIDI replaces live performance.

1990s.name: 1990s
1990s.psychosomatic_note: The transition decade. The loudness war begins. Creative residue is highest in alternative and hip-hop lineages as digital tools democratised production before the templates solidified.

2000s.name: 2000s
production_markers: Waves L2 limiter artifact (sharp transient limiting)
2000s.psychosomatic_note: The climax of extraction-through-production. Crest factor below 6dB means the body never gets dynamic rest. Continuous near-peak loudness creates fatigue. The manufacturing score correlates directly with crest_factor in this era.

2010s.name: 2010s
production_markers: moderate pullback from peak loudness war
2010s.psychosomatic_note: First signs of the body reclaiming space. Streaming normalisation punished hypercompression commercially. But manufacturing sophistication compensated — the template became more efficient, not less present.

2020s.name: 2020s
production_markers: Dolby Atmos and spatial audio integration
dynamic range gradual recovery in some contexts
2020s.psychosomatic_note: Contradictory signals: genuine creative democratisation through accessible tools, alongside accelerating template production via AI. The authentic and manufactured signals are harder to distinguish. Creative_residue computation becomes more important as surface similarity increases.
